name: sf-bootstrap-project
description: Binary-assertion test suite for /sf:bootstrap-project. Eval loop runs each test as a simulated invocation against a fresh wiki fixture and verifies the assertions hold.

tests.prompt: /sf:bootstrap-project sidecar-v2 --title "Sidecar V2" --description "Alcohol cut-back companion app, rebuilt on a stricter UX."
tests.expected_output_summary: Sub-wiki at ~/.startup-framework/wiki/projects/sidecar-v2/ with full taxonomy and init log entry.
binary_assertions: Target directory wiki/projects/sidecar-v2/ exists after the run
All 7 top-level files exist: PROJECT.md, REQUIREMENTS.md, ROADMAP.md, STATE.md, CONTEXT.md, index.md, log.md
All 3 subdirectories exist with .gitkeep markers: research/, decisions/, patterns/
log.md contains a line matching '## [<today>] init |' where <today> is the run date
log.md contains the friend's handle from identity.md (or 'unknown' fallback)
PROJECT.md contains the provided --description text in the intro paragraph
PROJECT.md frontmatter has project_name == 'sidecar-v2'
PROJECT.md frontmatter has project_title == 'Sidecar V2'
Master wiki/index.md has a new bullet under '## Projects' linking to projects/sidecar-v2/index.md
Master wiki/log.md has a new entry matching '## [<today>] init | Project sub-wiki bootstrapped'
No template output file contains any forbidden substring from wiki-skeleton/tests/forbidden-substrings.txt
Total files written by the skill is exactly 7 (taxonomy) plus 3 (.gitkeep) plus 2 (master index/log appends counted as edits, not writes) = 10 writes

tests.expected_output_summary: Skill detects existing target dir, switches to additive-diff mode, refuses to overwrite without explicit approval.
binary_assertions: Skill output mentions 'already exists' OR 'additive-diff' in the user-facing message
No file under wiki/projects/sidecar-v2/ that pre-existed has its modification time changed
If the friend declines the additive diff, exit status is 0 (clean refusal, not error)
If the friend declines, master wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md are NOT modified
If the friend accepts and the existing project lacks a new template file (e.g. PATTERNS_HINT.md.tmpl in a future framework version), that new file IS written and existing files are NOT touched

tests.expected_output_summary: Skill refuses non-kebab-case name and re-prompts.
binary_assertions: Skill output mentions 'kebab-case' OR shows the regex constraint in the rejection message
No directory wiki/projects/SidecarV2/ is created
No directory wiki/projects/sidecarv2/ is created (silent normalization is also forbidden)
Exit status is non-zero OR the skill explicitly waits for a corrected input

tests.expected_output_summary: When wiki/ master skeleton is absent, refuse and recommend /sf:install.
binary_assertions: If ~/.startup-framework/wiki/index.md does NOT exist, the skill refuses
Refusal message names '/sf:install' as the remediation
No partial sub-wiki is created at wiki/projects/foo/

notes: fixture: path to a YAML file under eval/fixtures/ describing the simulated environment (existing wiki contents, identity.md state, today's date, framework_version).
trigger_test: when true, the eval harness also verifies the SKILL.md description correctly activates on the prompt. Used by ADR-012 Layer 1.
All assertions are binary (true/false). Subjective quality goes through Skill Creator's dashboard, not here, per ADR-011.
